ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the player made their MLB debut */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position the player plays */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing hand of the player */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the player is with */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the player's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the award */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data to track changes over time */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships the team has won */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the team's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
